description: Replace daily card reveal opacity crossfade with 3D rotateY flip. Faces own the flip (Option B). Parent gets transform-style: preserve-3d. Deal/gather/shuffle animations unchanged (0.21s). revealMs bumped 180→500 to match CSS.
notes: Safari iOS QA needed: overflow:hidden + preserve-3d on same element can flatten 3D context. Fix if needed: move overflow:hidden to wrapper. Pending Apple enrollment.
